system: Answer the following question concisely and truthfully. If you are not sure, say so.
response: The September 11, 2001 (9/11) attacks were carried out by 19 terrorists associated with the extremist group al-Qaeda, which was led by Osama bin Laden. The official investigations, including the 9/11 Commission Report, found that al-Qaeda planned and executed the attacks. There is no credible evidence supporting claims that any other group or government was responsible for orchestrating the attacks.
